description: You are a Customer Success Manager organizing the support queue in FreeScout (admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!). Categorize all conversations from 'Acme Corp' (users with emails ending in @acmecorp.com) by creating and applying a new tag named 'Acme VIP'. Additionally, locate the conversation titled 'System Critical: Database Crash detected' and apply a new tag named 'Urgent'. Ensure no other conversations are tagged incorrectly.
